title: Romanian Dishes
description: A mod that adds popular dishes from Romania, including mici, sarmale, mamaliga and many more!
body:
![Picture 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60bafb919b246f533766aab9bea33b45219e4f73_0.webp)
![Picture 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70ac8b69b1b4cfc62e1ef19d252b97d7984b8e6d_0.webp)
![Picture 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f57a5fb8079a8494c4e7e34238aa6a90d7b2574.png)
![Picture 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a77e17e0f7609db1629d3a70b8ac52ea27a54158.png)

Text only description (Used for web crawlers or devices with slow internet):
**This mod adds popular dishes from the Romanian Culture** such as mici, sarmale, mamaliga and more! Each dish requires special ingredients and procedures. For example, in order to make mici edible, you have to cook them in a furnace first. Each update introduces new items and/or QOL features!

![Pictures of multiple items in the Romanian Dishes mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/213b6fffcfcf5c3b886177a47bb0a3b1523fdeee.png)

</details>



Feel free to use this mod in videos or ads but, please, give credits to me. 

**⚠️ Please note that bugs may occur.** They will (probably) be fixed in future updates.
